mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.place_id, p.place_id AS p_place_id, p.name AS p_name FROM RESERVATION r LEFT JOIN PLACE p ON r.place_id = p.place_id WHERE r.user_id = #{user_id} AND r.status = 'COMPLETED' AND r.reservation_id NOT IN( SELECT reservation_id FROM SURVEY ) ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_REVIEW.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO REVIEW( review_id, place_id, reservation_id, rating, content, created_at ) VALUES( #{review_id}, #{place_id}, #{reservation_id}, #{rating}, #{content}, SYSDATE )
